Class NodeEventArgs

Provides data for the OnBeforeExpandNode(ITree, BeforeExpandNodeEventArgs) and OnFocusNodeChanged(ITree, FocusedNodeChangedEventArgs).

Inheritance
object
EventArgs
NodeEventArgs
BeforeExpandNodeEventArgs
FocusedNodeChangedEventArgs
ValidateNodeTextEventArgs

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class NodeEventArgs : EventArgs
Remarks

The OnBeforeExpandNode(ITree, BeforeExpandNodeEventArgs) method called before expanding tree node. The OnFocusNodeChanged(ITree, FocusedNodeChangedEventArgs) method called after focused tree node changed.
